Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details from the R1 Concepts website to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active deals, keeping messaging accurate and conversion-ready without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTAs — tailored to R1 Concepts brake parts using the scraped product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers a fresh, brand-aligned marketing email every day with zero copywriting time, maintaining consistent audience engagement at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated email to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily email deployment to segmented audiences, driving repeat traffic and sales without manual scheduling or platform interaction.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product data, brand messaging, and promotional content from the DFC website to ground the email in accurate offerings.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps daily emails product-accurate and on-brand without manual input, reducing content prep time to zero.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a full marketing email for Dynamic Friction Company including subject line, body, and CTAs using the scraped website content.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the generated email to DFC contact lists through the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send workflow daily, ensuring the DFC audience receives timely, relevant communications without manual execution.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls open support tickets from HubSpot, retrieving customer messages, ticket metadata, and any associated order or contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes ticket intake automatically so the AI can immediately begin processing without a support rep manually triaging the queue.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually appropriate reply using product knowledge from the DFC website and ticket details.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts average ticket response time dramatically by delivering ready-to-send draft replies, letting support staff focus on review and approval rather than writing.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates each ticket in HubSpot with the AI-generated classification and draft reply, ready for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the support queue organized with pre-filled responses, reducing handle time per ticket and improving team throughput.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates all return and issue data from a distributed source into a single pull, eliminating manual CSV exports and data hunting.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, shareable view of customer issues and return patterns, enabling faster identification of product or fulfillment problems.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when known DFC customers engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals in real time, giving the sales team a precise window to reach out while interest is peak.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email containing the customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates lag between customer activity and sales follow-up, enabling same-session outreach that significantly increases conversion likelihood.

R1 Customer Agent.action: This agent is currently in development; specific platform connections and workflows have not yet been defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide automated customer-facing support for R1 Concepts once deployed, reducing inbound support load and improving response times.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and websites to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space, then discovers contact emails.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh list of warm, targeted leads daily without any manual prospecting, filling the top of the funnel automatically.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Drafts a personalized warm introduction email for each discovered lead, referencing the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos property details and the prospect's likely needs.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Produces tailored outreach at scale without a sales writer, increasing reply rates compared to generic blast emails.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs each new lead as a contact in HubSpot and triggers the outreach email send, tracking delivery and engagement.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Maintains a clean, trackable pipeline of sublet prospects so no lead is lost and follow-up can be managed systematically.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts, including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversion metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad performance data automatically, replacing manual reporting pulls and enabling faster optimization cycles.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes the Amazon Ads performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget reallocations, and keyword insights.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Surfaces actionable improvements across both brands simultaneously, reducing wasted ad spend and improving ACOS without requiring a full-time PPC analyst.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / DuckDuckGo API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube, Instagram, and the web using provided keywords to surface relevant content creators and their public profile data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator searching with an automated multi-platform sweep, surfacing a broad pool of relevant candidates instantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes discovered creator profiles using Google's Gemini model to assess relevance, audience fit, and content alignment with the target brand or campaign.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a raw list of creators down to genuinely relevant matches, saving qualification time and improving the quality of the outreach pipeline.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria — such as engagement rate, niche relevance, and audience size — to produce a ranked qualification score.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Gives teams an objective, consistent scoring system that instantly prioritizes the best creator partnerships, removing guesswork and bias from selection.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-approved outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach message is built from vetted, brand-aligned templates, maintaining consistency across campaigns without manual file retrieval.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompt logic to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting per creator with instant personalized drafts.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the designated sender account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates delivery of personalized outreach to dozens of creators simultaneously, dramatically compressing campaign launch timelines.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads and negotiation records to train the AI on past conversation patterns and outcomes.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, improving deal consistency and reducing back-and-forth by surfacing what has worked before.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation responses using learned conversation history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps creator conversations moving forward without requiring manual review of every reply, accelerating deal closure and reducing response lag.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts AI-generated negotiation replies to creator email threads in real time.
Creator Reponse.impact: Enables the team to manage high volumes of active creator conversations simultaneously without losing personalization or deal momentum.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify in-stock qualifying products and build the load sheet data.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle data against availability, cutting load sheet preparation time from hours to seconds.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation or alert to the relevant team channel once the load sheet is generated and ready for review.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps stakeholders instantly informed without requiring anyone to check email or request status updates manually.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and sends the Must Have Monday HubSpot email containing the finalized sales sheet and load sheet to the target contact list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Delivers a fully formatted, data-accurate weekly email to customers without any manual email building, ensuring on-time Monday sends every week.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap email content based on new product data and campaign guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces publish-ready email drafts in seconds, freeing the marketing team from writing launch copy manually for every new SKU release.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot for each new First to Market product launch and monthly recap, attaching relevant sales sheets.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Ensures every launch has a ready-to-review HubSpot draft with assets attached, compressing campaign setup from hours to minutes.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers accurate CRM performance data instantly, replacing manual HubSpot report exports that typically require significant prep time.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts SMS campaign performance metrics including sends, clicks, revenue, and subscriber growth for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS reporting data automatically, ensuring the deck reflects real send performance without manual Attentive dashboard pulls.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, conversion, and channel performance data from GA4 for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically surfaces traffic and conversion trends so the team always enters deck reviews with current, accurate web analytics.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with all collected metrics, charts, and data labels from each platform.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated monthly deck section in minutes instead of hours, eliminating manual copy-paste errors across eight slides.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gap opportunities by analyzing R1 Concepts' current search performance versus competitor ranking terms.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints exactly which high-value keywords to target, ensuring every blog produced addresses a real traffic opportunity rather than guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting identified keyword gaps, structured for Yoast SEO best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces ready-to-publish, search-optimized articles at scale, dramatically reducing content production cost and turnaround time per post.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta description, and readability settings.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes the full publish workflow automatically, eliminating manual CMS entry and ensuring every post meets SEO configuration standards on day one.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor names, PO numbers, due dates, and outstanding quantities for processing.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures all outstanding vendor PO data in one automated pull, removing the need for manual ERP report generation and export.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads processed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and triggering chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the entire vendor follow-up pipeline from data ingestion to email trigger, eliminating manual outreach scheduling and data entry.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number input and matches it against an embedded New Availability Guide to identify eligible load sheet entries.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Logs into Attentive via Chrome automation and clones the previous week's MHM SMS campaign as the starting template.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC customer sales transaction data including order history, product lines, purchase frequency, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete, current view of sales activity across all DFC customers, forming the data foundation for every downstream analysis and campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back audiences based on ERP sales data, then enrolls them in targeted email sequences.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Triggers segmented SMS campaigns to high-priority DFC customer groups including reorder reminders and win-back offers.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, saving coordinator time every Saturday.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Receives the new Excel file, uploads it to HubSpot File Manager, and generates a new public download URL.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures every Saturday email points to the correct, current session file without manual asset management or broken links.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules send for 8AM Saturday.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email to the full list on time with zero manual build effort, maintaining audience engagement every session week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's shop, distributor, and fleet audience segments using keyword-driven prompts.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale without a dedicated copywriter, accelerating DFC's organic search presence in competitive B2B categories.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes it with proper SEO fields, categories, and formatting applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps the DFC content calendar populated consistently, driving compounding organic traffic from shops, fleets, and distributors searching for relevant topics.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video formats, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images via Puppeteer, and retrieves vehicle background data from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset gathering, giving the AI a rich context base so the script and visuals are accurate and on-brand from the start.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data and reference content to generate a fully structured Friction Friday video script, including hook, talking points, and outro.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready script in seconds rather than hours, maintaining a consistent tone and format across every episode without writer involvement.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a selected AI voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Removes the need for a recording session entirely, delivering a consistent, professional-quality voiceover that can be immediately dropped into the video assembly.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Logs all generated assets — script text, image URLs, audio file link, and assembled video metadata — into a structured row via an Apps Script webhook for review and publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Keeps every video package organized and traceable in one place, so the team can review, approve, or queue episodes for upload without digging through folders or chat threads.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all active R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, delays, branching logic, and contact performance data.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies optimized trigger conditions, updated delays, and refined enrollment criteria to site visit and welcome series workflows.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, purchase history, and account classifications.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Provides the foundational customer data needed to bridge ERP records with CRM contacts, enabling sales automation to act on real transactional behavior.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects a new R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts the title, description, transcript, thumbnail, and video URL.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly impressions, clicks, average position, and keyword ranking data for all DFC blog URLs.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides ground-truth SEO performance data that shows exactly which blog posts are gaining or losing search visibility week over week.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Fetches session counts, engaged sessions, traffic sources, and conversion events attributed to DFC blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly impressions, clicks, keyword rankings, and URL-level search performance for all R1 Concepts blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly session data, engaged users, traffic attribution, and goal completions from R1 blog pages.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Shows the downstream business impact of blog traffic by connecting organic visits to on-site engagement and conversion activity for R1.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Reads R1 blog publishing records including post count, publish dates, and content metadata to measure agent output volume.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides accountability metrics for the blog agent's monthly content production, linking publishing cadence to traffic and ranking trends.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and triggers the processing workflow upon detection.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates the need to manually identify and route invoice PDFs, ensuring every incoming vendor invoice enters the stamping workflow automatically.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and feeds URL-level visit data into the workflow trigger system.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Ensures only high-intent page visits fire email sequences, reducing noise and improving send relevance.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets and captures the full message content, contact info, and issue category.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all inbound support requests into a single intake point, ensuring no ticket is missed or delayed.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, determines urgency, and drafts an appropriate resolution response based on R1 Concepts product knowledge.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Logs the AI-generated response, updates the ticket status, and routes escalations to the appropriate human agent.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Keeps support queues organized and ensures SLA compliance with automatic status updates and routing.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young shares the monthly new arrivals file in Teams, triggering the agent to begin the NAG distribution workflow.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual coordination steps by using a familiar communication tool as the workflow trigger.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Uploads the new arrivals file to the DFC backend, making product data available for email and SMS content population.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies prospective new shipping carriers, auto-enrolls them in an outreach sequence, and sends templated RFQ emails requesting rate and lead time information.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Pulls full-month performance data across all paid channels including spend, results, ROAS, and audience metrics.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for new tasks, updates, or project changes and captures the relevant task details and assignee information.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated task and project status summary to the appropriate team members or stakeholders.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Captures Mark's vehicle specification submission — make, model, year, and any additional fitment details — and triggers the downstream workflow.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Takes the raw inventory query results and structures them into a clean, organized layout optimized for Excel output, with clear sections for what DFC stocks and what is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet formatting work, ensuring Mark receives a polished, consistent file every time regardless of how complex the fitment data is.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment along with a brief summary of what was found for his requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a ready-to-use file directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, compressing what used to take hours of manual work into a fully automated turnaround.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipments, and flags any parts with no active source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of redundant work and eliminating conflicting data across the team.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report structure, enriching each line item with current status and highlighting dead-end parts that have no fulfillment path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static weekly report into a dynamic, decision-ready document that tells the team exactly where each order stands and which problems need immediate escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications pre-populated with the relevant order status details for each affected customer, ready for review and sending.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to communicate backorder updates from hours of individual drafting to a single review step, improving customer response times and reducing team workload significantly.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings with their associated make, model, year, and part number fitment data.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor catalog reference in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse three separate websites, ensuring no fitment gaps are missed.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify where DFC has coverage and where catalog gaps exist.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear picture of market coverage versus DFC's current lineup, directly informing product development and sourcing decisions without manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about their demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified in the gap analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Turns catalog gaps into active market intelligence by gathering real demand data from customers, enabling data-driven decisions on which new parts are worth developing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, gap analysis, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one definitive, always-current source of truth for the two-piece rotor market landscape, replacing scattered notes and manual tracking with a structured output he can act on immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions — and extracts the full text content for every live ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across the entire active ad portfolio in one pull, making it possible to audit at scale without manually opening each ad in the platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every match, recording the exact ad, field name, and matched text for each instance found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches every instance of a flagged phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of human error or missed matches in a manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged-copy report listing every ad where a match was found, the specific field it appeared in, and the exact copy text containing the phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable compliance or quality report in the right inbox on demand, enabling fast remediation without anyone needing to log into ad platforms to investigate.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, detects incoming application emails, and extracts the candidate's name, email address, and any attached resume files.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates the need for anyone to manually triage an applicant inbox, ensuring every submission is captured and acted on immediately regardless of volume.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF into an organized folder structure in Drive, labeled by candidate name and application date for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Keeps all applicant documents centrally stored and consistently named, removing the risk of attachments getting buried in an inbox or lost across team members' local folders.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume against the requirements of open roles and produces a structured score with a hire/deny/pause recommendation and a brief rationale for the decision.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts initial screening time dramatically by giving the hiring team a prioritized, reasoned shortlist instead of a raw stack of unreviewed applications.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, recommendation, role, and decision status to a master dashboard, and routes paused-role candidates into a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, searchable record of every applicant and decision, replacing scattered inbox threads with a single source of truth that requires no manual data entry.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents across the portfolio — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. There were no new agents added this week, and no stage changes to report. The completed side of the pipeline remains a solid foundation of deployed, running automation driving daily value across email marketing, creator outreach, paid media, SEO, and operations. While this was a quieter week for pipeline movement, the team's in-progress work continues advancing toward completion, and the planned backlog keeps the roadmap full and exciting. Great momentum overall — more updates to come next week!
